{
  "verdict": "reject",
  "preserved": [
    "Backend list and artifact routes functionality"
  ],
  "regressions": [
    "Top filter buttons: two buttons do not fire events",
    "Button styling: colors are muted and appear disabled, violating high contrast and active/inactive state requirements",
    "Typography: Font stack was changed from the accepted prototype",
    "UI Scope: Extra gradient cards added that were not part of the accepted design"
  ],
  "required_fixes": [
    "Restore event listeners for all top filter buttons",
    "Update button CSS to ensure high contrast for active states (bright primary/white) and readable, non-disabled appearance for inactive states",
    "Revert font stack to match the selected prototype",
    "Remove unauthorized gradient cards"
  ],
  "tests_to_run": [
    "Unit test: Verify click events fire for all top filter buttons",
    "Visual regression test: Compare button contrast ratios against WCAG AA/AAA standards",
    "Visual regression test: Verify font family and hierarchy match the prototype",
    "Integration test: Confirm backend list and artifact routes still return expected data",
    "UI audit: Verify absence of unauthorized gradient cards"
  ]
}
